item.title: About me
item.description: My name is Wout Notermans, I’m a math student and computer nerd from Belgium. My main interests are computational and applied mathematics, with an additional focus on programming and optimization. I’m also a musician and have been playing the euphonium for almost my entire life. I mainly listen to eurobeat, video game OST and jazz, but I’m also a big fan of old-time musicals like Singin’ In The Rain. I mainly program in Python, but I’m also interested in learing Lua which is known for its extreme speed.
